\section{Results}

\begin{table}[h]

\begin{threeparttable}
\begin{tabular}{ll}
\hline
A & B\tnote{*} \\
\hline
1 & 2 \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
\begin{tablenotes}[flushleft]
\footnotesize
\item[*] An explanatory note.
\end{tablenotes}
\end{threeparttable}
\end{table}
